spec.description: The SLO (service level objective) and other metrics displayed on this dashboard are for informational purposes only.
spec.title: Notice

options.content: The SLO (service level objective) and other metrics displayed on this dashboard are for informational purposes only.

spec.expr: sum by (resource) (code_resource:apiserver_request_total:rate5m{verb="write",code=~"5..", cluster="$cluster"}) / sum by (resource) (code_resource:apiserver_request_total:rate5m{verb="write", cluster="$cluster"})

spec.description: How many percent of write requests (POST|PUT|PATCH|DELETE) per second are returned with errors (5xx)?
spec.title: Write SLI - Errors

spec.description: How many seconds is the 99th percentile for writing (POST|PUT|PATCH|DELETE) a given resource?
spec.title: Write SLI - Duration

spec.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum(rate(workqueue_queue_duration_seconds_bucket{job="apiserver", instance=~"$instance", cluster="$cluster"}[$__rate_interval])) by (instance, name, le))

spec.description: How many percent of requests (both read and write) in 30 days have been answered successfully and fast enough?
spec.title: Availability (30d) > 99.000%

spec.description: How much error budget is left looking at our 99.000% availability guarantee?
spec.title: Error Budget (30d) > 99.000%

spec.description: How many percent of read requests (LIST,GET) in 30 days have been answered successfully and fast enough?
spec.title: Read Availability (30d)

spec.description: How many read requests (LIST,GET) per second do the apiservers get by code?
spec.title: Read SLI - Requests

spec.expr: sum by (resource) (code_resource:apiserver_request_total:rate5m{verb="read",code=~"5..", cluster="$cluster"}) / sum by (resource) (code_resource:apiserver_request_total:rate5m{verb="read", cluster="$cluster"})

spec.description: How many percent of read requests (LIST,GET) per second are returned with errors (5xx)?
spec.title: Read SLI - Errors

spec.description: How many seconds is the 99th percentile for reading (LIST|GET) a given resource?
spec.title: Read SLI - Duration

spec.description: How many percent of write requests (POST|PUT|PATCH|DELETE) in 30 days have been answered successfully and fast enough?
spec.title: Write Availability (30d)

spec.description: How many write requests (POST|PUT|PATCH|DELETE) per second do the apiservers get by code?
spec.title: Write SLI - Requests
